name: Adam Stark
likes: Lego, especially City and Star Wars sets
Soccer (plays in the town rec league)
Graphic novels (Dog Man, Wings of Fire, Bone)
dislikes: Anything labeled 'for big kids only' (sensitive about feeling behind his older brother)
Receiving clothing as a main present
interests: Mild interest in family-friendly YouTube gaming channels
notes: Reads a grade or two above his level. Loves explaining facts to anyone who will listen. Prefers physical, hands-on gifts over screen-based ones.
